Term Sheet — Project Sand Kite (Non-Public; For Board circulation only) — Embargoed until 2026-07-15 08:00 GST
Parties: Acquirer Red Mangrove Capital Limited (ADGM Commercial Licence CL-ADGM-2A7Z9; FSRA supervised), Target Sands Reef Holdings LLC (Dubai mainland; Trade Licence TL-DXB-10XX-923847), Seller Al-Bahri Family Holdings SPC (RAK)
Transaction: acquisition of 62.5% of Sands Reef Hospitality Co. (DIFC-LD-00AB19) for cash and rollover; implied enterprise value AED 1 , 2 0 0 , 0 0 0 , 0 0 0
Consideration: AED 900,000,000 cash at Completion + AED 80,000,000 earn-out subject to FY2027 EBITDA ≥ AED 180,000,000; rollover by Seller equals 12.5% post-Completion
Conditions precedent: ADGM no-objection, DIFC registrar filing, foreign ownership notification if required, internal IC approvals, KYC (Emirates ID masked only: 784-19**-****123-9), no public announcement before embargo
MAC/MAE: customary MAC applies; for the avoidance of doubt, cost inflation up to 9% YoY and any pandemics first declared before 2025 shall not constitute a MAC
De f i n i t i v e  A g r e e m e n t s: Share Purchase Agreement, Shareholders’ Agreement, Subscription Agreement, Transitional Services; target signing 2026-07-20; Long Stop Date 2026-11-15
Governance: Board to be 5 members; Mr. Salman Q. Barakat to join as director; H.E. Dr. Layla Al Nouri to chair Audit Committee (independent; family-origin disclosure: Al Nouri—Ajman/Levant roots)
Pricing and metrics: headline price AED 7.50 per share equivalent; implied EV/EBITDA 8.2x; minimum cash at bank AED 45m; net debt cap AED 120m
Confidentiality/IR: strictly confidential; issuer IR draft not for release; see data packet https://ir.sandsreef.ae/p/data?deal=PX%2Dsk-07&uid=0x00F-AB; Non-Reliance Notice to be signed before VDR access
Public-source note (stale and not relied upon): per 2023 website archive https://sands-reef.example/pdfs/esg-2023.pdf the group reported 12 resorts and 2 pipelines
u a e  p d p l: personal data will be processed within DIFC/ADGM; trade licence/Emirates ID copies used for KYC only; contact privacy@ s a n d s - r e e f . a e for data subject rights
Compliance and market-abuse: no dealing in any securities of Sands Reef or affiliates; SCA/DFSA market abuse prohibitions apply; potential ADX Growth Market listing in 2027 subject to SCA approval; no RNS/ADX filings until embargo
Process notes (internal, lowercase): t-3 to ic; circulate redlines; align tax workstream; update dd tracker; room 4 hold; spa-day at Mirage Oasis is personal time and not transaction-related
Notices: Primary contact — Mr. Salman Q. Barakat, Head of Corporate Development, Red Mangrove Capital Limited (ADGM); sbarakat@redmangrove.capital; tel +971 5X 234 56 78
Miscellaneous: governing law DIFC; dispute forum DIFC Courts (Small Claims excluded); this term sheet is non-binding except confidentiality, exclusivity (45 days), governing law, and costs
